intro: CANONICAL is a way of keeping one spine: projects ship, areas hold ongoing responsibility, assets are reusable, inbox is triage.

nodes.label: Projects
nodes.description: Things with a finish line — builds, launches, migrations.

nodes.label: Areas
nodes.description: Ongoing domains without a single ship date — health, finance, craft.

nodes.label: Assets
nodes.description: Reusable pieces — templates, media, libraries, references.

nodes.label: Inbox
nodes.description: Capture and triage — Downloads, Screenshots, then sort into the spine.

nodes.label: Ops
nodes.description: Tasks, logs, automation — daily report, manifests, master task list.

nodes.label: Review
nodes.description: Unclear items parked until they earn a real destination.
